hero.title: MASTER YOUR PIANO CHORDS
hero.subtitle: Unlock your musical potential with structured practice and competitive quizzes. The keys are yours to command.

practice.title: Practice Mode
practice.desc: Drill major, minor, and dominant 7th chords at your own pace.

quiz.title: Quiz Mode
quiz.desc: Test your recognition speed and compete on the global leaderboard.

home.tips_0: Don't know C major? ...Just kidding. It's C-E-G!
home.tips_1: Skip practice today and yesterday-you wins
home.tips_2: Am sounds sad? Not practicing is sadder
home.tips_3: Piano never lies. It plays exactly how bad you are. Motivating, right?
home.tips_5: 3 chords and you can play half of all songs. Seriously.
home.tips_6: I used to mix up C and D too. I'm... slightly better now.
home.tips_7: Practice doesn't lie. But it does ghost you sometimes.
home.tips_8: Stop scrolling and go play piano~
home.tips_9: ii-V-I is the backbone of jazz. No excuses.
home.tips_10: Dm7-G7-Cmaj7... if you hear it, you've got jazz ears already
home.tips_11: The tritone resolution in a dom7? Pure dopamine. Trust me.
home.tips_12: Every major scale: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. That's it. You're welcome.
home.tips_13: Relative minor? C's bestie is Am. They share everything.
home.tips_14: sus4 = king of tension. Not resolving it is... anxiety.
home.tips_15: dim7 = all minor 3rds. Perfectly symmetric. Kinda creepy tbh.
home.tips_16: Change one voicing and the whole vibe shifts. Actual magic.
home.tips_17: Lydian mode has a #4. That dreamy floaty sound? Yeah, that's it.
home.tips_18: 88 keys on a piano, you'll use about 30. The rest are decorative.
home.tips_19: Can't switch chords fast? Just do it 500 more times. Not joking.
home.tips_20: Mozart composed at 5. Don't compare yourself. Seriously.
home.tips_21: Bach had 20 kids and still wrote 1000+ pieces. No excuses.
home.tips_22: Debussy got bad grades in harmony class. Then broke all the rules. Legend.
home.tips_23: Mozart composed while playing billiards. OG multitasker.
home.tips_24: Bach loved coffee so much he wrote a 'Coffee Cantata'. Relatable king.
home.tips_25: Debussy said 'burn all music theory books'. A bit aggressive tbh.
home.tips_26: Chopin's hands were so big he could reach 10ths easily. Born with cheats.
home.tips_27: Liszt was famous for snapping piano strings mid-concert. Built different.
home.tips_28: Beethoven wrote symphonies after going deaf. Your excuses just vanished.
home.tips_29: Satie bought 12 identical suits to avoid choosing. Decision fatigue solved.
home.tips_30: Octopuses have 3 hearts. You have 1. Use it to practice.
home.tips_31: Honey never spoils. 3000-year-old honey is still edible. But why are you reading this?
home.tips_32: Bananas are berries. Strawberries aren't. The world is a lie...
home.tips_33: Time spent reading this = time not practicing. Just saying.
home.tips_34: Sound doesn't travel in space. Your piano skills are safe from aliens.
home.tips_35: Cats sleep 16 hours a day. Don't be jealous, be productive.
home.tips_36: Can't decide what to eat? Play piano first, think later.
home.tips_37: Polar bear fur is actually transparent. Things aren't what they seem. Like diminished chords.
home.tips_38: You'd need ~230,000 pianos stacked to reach the moon. Useless knowledge +1
home.tips_39: What time is it? It's piano o'clock.
home.tips_40: J Dilla made beats off-grid on purpose. Not a mistake — it's groove.
home.tips_41: Hip-hop beats are built on piano samples. What you learn here? Useful.
home.tips_42: J Dilla made 'Donuts' from a hospital bed. Your excuses just expired.
home.tips_43: Bill Evans revolutionized left-hand voicings. Proved you don't need the root. Legend.
home.tips_44: Nujabes sampled jazz piano into hip-hop. Genre is a door, not a wall.
home.tips_45: Kanye's first hit started from a soul piano sample. Piano is the answer.
home.tips_46: You listen to lo-fi hip-hop to study? Why not make that piano loop yourself?
home.tips_47: Cmaj7 - Dm7 - Em7 - Fmaj7... memorize diatonic chords and everything changes
home.tips_48: Secondary dominant? V/V borrows from another key for a moment. It's not cheating.
home.tips_49: Neapolitan chord (bII) shows up in dramatic classical moments. Total drama queen.
home.tips_50: Pivot chord modulation: sneak into a new key through a shared chord. Smooth criminal.
home.tips_51: Augmented 6th chords come in Italian, French, and German. A European tour of tension.
home.tips_52: Comping = rhythm + voicing for accompaniment. It's not about flash. It's about taste.
home.tips_53: Tritone sub: replace a dom7 with the dom7 a b5 away. Jazz's secret weapon.
home.tips_54: Modal interchange: borrow chords from parallel minor. Try bVII. You'll thank me.
home.tips_55: Ascending chromatic bass under chord changes... once you try it, you can't stop.
home.tips_56: Upper structure triads: stack a triad on a dom7 and tensions appear like magic.
